# Language Layouts (full index)

> Notion templates for language learners and teachers, built on Paul Nation's Four Strands framework. Made by Damien Herlihy — "from a language teacher who never stopped being a learner."

## About Language Layouts

Language Layouts makes Notion templates and offers coaching for two audiences: language learners who
want a system for true mastery, and language teachers who want to plan and deliver results. Everything
is organised around Paul Nation's Four Strands — a research-backed way to balance how you spend
learning (or teaching) time. The maker is Damien Herlihy, a TESOL-trained language teacher who also
co-founded the school TEC in Trat, Thailand, and writes at damienherlihy.com.

Design language draws on warm, paper-like neutrals; each of the Four Strands has its own colour for
tagging and visual coding.

## Templates

### For learners
- Language Learning Planner — Free. Plan and track balanced study across all four strands so you
  always know what to work on next. https://www.notion.com/templates/language-learning-planner-205
- Vocab Tracker — Paid. Build conversational confidence through word cards, spaced repetition, and
  context-rich vocabulary. https://www.notion.com/templates/language-layouts-vocabulary
- Language Learning Plus — Paid. Everything in the free planner plus vocab recording, learning
  resources, and goal-setting. https://www.notion.com/templates/language-layouts-language-learning-plus

### For teachers
- Lesson Planner — Free. Plan four-strand lessons that balance input, output, language focus and
  fluency in every class. https://www.notion.com/templates/language-layouts-lesson-planner-basic
- Lesson Planner Plus — Paid. A complete teaching workspace for planning, tracking student progress,
  managing homework, and task management. https://www.notion.com/templates/language-layouts-lesson-planner-plus
- The Online Language Teacher — Paid, coming soon. The total online language tutor solution.

## Services
- One-on-One Coaching — personalised guidance on using your template, building better teaching
  habits, or planning your language learning.
- Deep Dive Sessions — focused problem-solving for adapting your template or customising your Notion.
- Space Transformation — we design and build a complete Notion workspace tailored to how you learn or
  teach, from scratch or from an existing setup.

## The Four Strands
- Meaning-Focused Input (MFI) — learning through listening and reading you can mostly understand;
  comprehensible input and extensive reading.
- Meaning-Focused Output (MFO) — learning through speaking and writing real ideas; pushed output and
  task repetition.
- Language-Focused Learning (LFL) — deliberate study of grammar, vocabulary, pronunciation, spelling.
- Fluency Development (FD) — becoming fluent with known material; speed, ease, 4/3/2, repeated reading.
- Balance: aim for roughly 25% of time in each strand.
